titleStmt.title: SII 27.133: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 133. (A.R. No. 589 of 1929-30.) HĒRUN1JE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Mahālingēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1377, Yuva, Kārttika śu. 1, Sunday corresponding to 1455 A.D., October 12.

It records a gift of land and money to god Mahādēva of Bārakūru (?) for offerings and a perpetual lamp, by several individuals, when Paṇḍarasa-Voḍeya was governing Bārakūru. Pemmarasa wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayi
lōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1377 neya yuvasaṁvatsara
kārttika śuddha 1 Ādivāradalu śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa hiṁdurāyasuratrāṇa śrīmatu ya
llikārjunamahārāyaru vijayanagarada stirasiṁhā
lu sakala dharmava pratipālisutiddalli Avara Āgnā
mappa bārakūra siṁhāsanādhipati paṁḍarasavoḍeya nirūpadiṁ bārakū
ra śrīmahādēvara Amrutapaḍige naṁdādīvige koṭṭa bhūmiya vivara
śavakalkaṭṭana catussīmeya vivara nāraṇa mūḍeya gaḍiyiṁ pa
ḍuva śivamūḍeya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa koḍamakkeya gaḍiyiṁ baḍaga
kiṁnyaru kalkaṭṭana gaḍiyiṁ teṁka voḷagāda bījavari 4 mūrḍe
mūṟuhāḷe voṁdumane saha Āruvāra mūlavāgi
sīmeyakru dēvarige naḍaudaṁ hāne 4 mūḍe Akki
siyahonnu 4 Akṣaradalu Akki nālkuvare mūḍe hoṁnu nālku
Ācaṁdrārka Ā bāḷinalli naḍaudu mahādēvarige yāru
māḍidavaru yettu baḷiya dugakka seṭṭitiya makkaḷu
boṁmaka kaluseṭiti sāvaṁṇaseṭi jakkaṁṇa mūli heggaḍeya ma
ṁmagaḷu Aḷiyaṁdiru māḍida dharṁma sūryyōparāga pu
ṇya kāladali māḍida dharṁmakke sākṣigaḷu braṁhmaṇaru
kkalu heggaḍe mādāḷitiya yibaravoppa bāḷina kartanavoppa
yiṁtappudakke baraha . peṁmarasara baraha . bāra
kta manōdatta dhārādattaka Aḷupidavaru taṁde
tāyanu kapilenu vāraṇāsi
ṁda pāpakke hōharu . Ā bhūmi
ti maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
